name: Domain Finder
description: Discover root domains owned by a target organization using Amass enum. Note: currently shares binary with the Amass plugin — see issue #547.
long_description: Uses Amass enum to surface domains related to a target organization. This plugin currently shares its underlying binary and command with the Amass plugin. A future update should replace it with a dedicated tool (e.g. reverse WHOIS, Amass intel mode) to make it truly distinct.
